answers: I'm doing well and ready to help you with bookings, vehicle availability, payments, or rental requirements.
I'm here and ready to assist. You can ask me about available vehicles, booking steps, or rental policies.
I'm doing great, thank you. Let me know if you need help with booking, payments, or finding a vehicle.

Mabuti ako, salamat. Sabihin mo lang kung kailangan mo ng tulong sa booking, bayad, o paghahanap ng sasakyan.

english.question: Who are you?
answers: I am RentifyPro AI, your assistant for vehicle rentals, booking steps, payments, rental requirements, and vehicle recommendations.
I'm the RentifyPro AI assistant. I can help you find available vehicles and answer booking-related questions.
I am RentifyPro AI. You can ask me about vehicle availability, booking, payments, and rental policies.

answers: Ako si RentifyPro AI, ang assistant mo para sa vehicle rentals, booking steps, bayad, rental requirements, at vehicle recommendations.

Ako si RentifyPro AI. Maaari kang magtanong tungkol sa availability ng sasakyan, booking, bayad, at rental policies.

answers: I can help you check vehicle availability, recommendations, booking steps, rental requirements, payment methods, insurance, deposits, and rental policies.

I can assist with finding a vehicle, understanding booking steps, checking payment options, and explaining rental requirements.

english.question: Thank you.
answers: You're welcome. If you need help with booking, vehicle availability, or rental requirements, just let me know.

english.question: How much is the rental per day or hour?
answers: Rental rates depend on the vehicle you choose and the rental duration. Which vehicle are you interested in, and for how many hours or days?
Prices vary depending on the vehicle type and rental period. Please let me know your preferred vehicle and schedule.
The rental cost depends on the selected vehicle and dates. Kindly share your preferred unit and rental duration.
Please choose the vehicle type such as Car, Van, or Motorcycle and indicate whether you need hourly or daily rental.

filipino.question: Magkano ang renta bawat araw o oras?
answers: Ang presyo ng renta ay nakadepende sa sasakyang pipiliin at sa tagal ng pagrenta. Anong sasakyan ang gusto mo at ilang oras o araw ito gagamitin?
Nag-iiba ang presyo batay sa uri ng sasakyan at haba ng pagrenta. Sabihin ang napiling sasakyan at iskedyul para maibigay ang halaga.
Depende ang bayad sa sasakyan at petsa ng renta. Ibahagi ang napili mong unit at tagal ng pagrenta upang makapagbigay kami ng eksaktong presyo.
Pumili ng uri ng sasakyan tulad ng Kotse, Van, o Motorsiklo at sabihin kung hourly o daily ang gusto mong renta.

english.question: Is insurance included?
answers: Yes, insurance is included in all vehicle rentals.
All vehicles are insured for your peace of mind.
Yes, every rental comes with insurance coverage.
Insurance coverage is included in all vehicles. Let me know if you would like details about the coverage.

filipino.question: Kasama ba ang insurance?
answers: Oo, kasama ang insurance sa lahat ng nirentahang sasakyan.
Ang lahat ng sasakyan ay may kasamang insurance para sa inyong seguridad.
Oo, may kasamang insurance coverage ang bawat renta.
Kasama ang insurance sa lahat ng sasakyan. Sabihin lang kung gusto mong malaman ang detalye ng coverage.

english.question: Is there a security deposit? How much?
answers: Yes, there is a refundable security deposit of ₱1,000.
A ₱1,000 security deposit is required and will be refunded once the vehicle is returned without damage and with a full tank of fuel.
The required deposit is ₱1,000. It will be returned if the vehicle is in good condition and fully refueled.
A ₱1,000 deposit is required as assurance. It is refundable upon proper vehicle return.

filipino.question: May security deposit ba? Magkano?
answers: Oo, may ₱1,000 na refundable na security deposit.
Kinakailangan ang ₱1,000 na deposito at ibinabalik ito kapag naibalik ang sasakyan na walang sira at may full tank ng gasolina.
Ang deposito ay ₱1,000. Maibabalik ito kung maayos ang kondisyon ng sasakyan at puno ang tangke sa oras ng pagbabalik.
May ₱1,000 na deposito bilang garantiya. Refundable ito kapag maayos ang pagbabalik ng sasakyan.

english.question: What payment methods are accepted?
answers: We accept Cash, GCash, and Bank Transfer.
Payment can be made via Cash, GCash, or Bank Transfer.
Available payment options include Cash, GCash, and Bank Transfer.

filipino.question: Anong mga paraan ng pagbabayad ang tinatanggap?
answers: Tumatanggap kami ng Cash, GCash, at Bank Transfer.
Maaaring magbayad gamit ang Cash, GCash, o Bank Transfer.
Ang mga opsyon sa pagbabayad ay Cash, GCash, at Bank Transfer.

english.question: What are the requirements to rent a car?
answers: You must present at least one valid ID, preferably a Driver’s License.
A valid government-issued ID is required. A Driver’s License is preferred.
Please provide one valid ID to process your booking.

filipino.question: Ano ang mga kinakailangan upang makapag-renta ng sasakyan?
answers: Kinakailangan ang isang valid ID, mas mainam kung Driver’s License.
Kailangan ang balidong pagkakakilanlan. Mas mainam kung Driver’s License ang ipapakita.
Magbigay ng isang valid ID upang maproseso ang booking o pagrenta.

english.question: What is the minimum age to rent?
answers: The minimum age requirement is 18 years old.
You must be at least 18 years old to rent a vehicle.

filipino.question: Ano ang minimum na edad upang makapag-renta?
answers: Ang minimum na edad ay labing-walong (18) taong gulang.
Kinakailangang 18 taong gulang pataas upang makapag-renta ng sasakyan.

english.question: Do I need an ID or proof of address?
answers: Yes, a valid ID or proof of address is required for verification.
Identification documents are required to approve your booking.

filipino.question: Kailangan ba ng ID o patunay ng tirahan?
answers: Oo, kinakailangan ang valid ID o patunay ng tirahan para sa beripikasyon.
Kailangan ang mga dokumento para maaprubahan ang iyong booking.

english.question: What vehicles are available?
answers: We offer Sedan, Van, SUV, and Pickup Truck options.
Available vehicles include Sedans, Vans, SUVs, and Pickup Trucks.
You may choose from Sedan, Van, SUV, or Pickup Truck.

filipino.question: Anong mga sasakyan ang available?
answers: Mayroon kaming Sedan, Van, SUV, at Pickup Truck.
Maaaring pumili mula sa Sedan, Van, SUV, o Pickup Truck.
Available ang Sedan, Van, SUV, at Pickup Truck na pagpipilian.

english.question: What transmission types are available?
answers: We offer both Automatic and Manual transmission vehicles.
Automatic and Manual transmission options are available.

filipino.question: Anong uri ng transmission ang available?
answers: Mayroong Automatic at Manual na transmission.
Maaaring pumili sa pagitan ng Automatic at Manual na transmission.

english.question: Should I return the vehicle with a full tank?
answers: Yes, the vehicle must be returned with a full tank of fuel.
Please return the vehicle fully refueled to avoid additional charges.

filipino.question: Kailangan bang ibalik na full tank ang sasakyan?
answers: Oo, kinakailangang ibalik ang sasakyan na may full tank ng gasolina.
Dapat puno ang tangke ng gasolina sa oras ng pagbabalik upang maiwasan ang dagdag singil.

english.question: How many passengers can the vehicles accommodate?
answers: Our vehicles can accommodate between 5 to 15 passengers depending on the type.
Passenger capacity varies by vehicle, ranging from 5 to 15 persons.

filipino.question: Ilang pasahero ang kayang isakay?
answers: Depende sa uri ng sasakyan, maaaring magsakay ng 5 hanggang 15 pasahero.
Nag-iiba ang kapasidad ng sasakyan mula 5 hanggang 15 katao depende sa modelo.

english.question: Can I choose a specific vehicle model?
answers: Yes, you may choose a specific model subject to availability.
Specific models are available upon request depending on availability.

filipino.question: Maaari bang pumili ng partikular na modelo?
answers: Oo, maaaring pumili ng partikular na modelo depende sa availability.
Puwedeng mag-request ng tiyak na modelo kung ito ay available sa napiling petsa at oras.

english.question: How do I book?
answers: To book, you must first verify your account and submit your personal information and Driver’s License for verification.
Complete the account verification process, choose your preferred vehicle and dates, and confirm your booking.

filipino.question: Paano mag-book?
answers: Upang makapag-book, kailangan munang i-verify ang account at magsumite ng personal na impormasyon at Driver’s License para sa beripikasyon.
Tapusin ang proseso ng beripikasyon, pumili ng sasakyan at petsa, at kumpirmahin ang booking.

english.question: Is same-day rental allowed?
answers: Yes, same-day rentals are allowed subject to vehicle availability.
You may book a vehicle on the same day if it is still available.

filipino.question: Pinapayagan ba ang same-day rental?
answers: Oo, pinapayagan ang same-day rental kung may available na sasakyan.
Maaaring magrenta sa parehong araw kung available pa ang sasakyan.

english.question: Is there an advance booking discount?
answers: We currently do not offer discounts for advance bookings.
There are no advance booking discounts at this time.

filipino.question: May discount ba sa advance booking?
answers: Sa kasalukuyan, wala kaming discount para sa advance booking.
Wala pang diskwento para sa advance booking sa ngayon.
